name: Bulger'n Bean Hot Dish
recipeIngredient: 11/5 oz can condensed bean with bacon soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground beef and drain well.
2. Combine all ingredients except cheese in a Crock-Pot.
3. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 9 hours.
4. Just before serving, sprinkle with grated cheese.
5. Serve over hot cornbread.
Serves 6
